name: AaronZhang
cooked: Thanks, Christian — and for the eltoo work as well. This line of experiments was very much inspired by it. The CSV unilateral path is included but not exercised yet. Happy to extend the demo if you have thoughts on the timeout side.
topic_title: Eltoo State Chain on Signet: Three Rounds, Six Transactions (APO + CTV)
